title: Soundheads
description: Play every Minecraft sound with Note Blocks in survival mode
body:
# Soundheads
Craft soundheads at the stonecutter. Place them on top of Noteblocks to make that Noteblock play the sound. Note Blocks can be powered by right clicking or with Redstone. The name of the sound is in the name of the soundhead.

## How to craft
At the stonecutter
- Dirt: Block sounds
- Quartz: Item sounds
- Gold: Entity sounds
- Diamond: Music & Music Disc sounds
- Redstone: Misc. sounds
